fighters.name: Aric Veyne
fighters.title: The Silver Spire
fighters.notes: SS-Rank. Has not lost in fourteen months.

fighters.name: Kassia Mor
fighters.title: The Ironwife
fighters.notes: Known for ending fights early. Rarely takes damage.

fighters.name: Brother Vex
fighters.notes: Cult-trained. Movements that should not be physically possible.

fighters.name: Drell the Unfinished
fighters.title: Crowd Favourite
fighters.notes: Lost his right hand three seasons ago. Still ranked.

fighters.name: Sela Vance
fighters.notes: Active Warden. Fights for extra income. Korin disapproves.

fighters.name: The Composite
fighters.title: Most Complaints Filed
fighters.notes: Suspected of illegal augmentation. FTA has an open file.

fighters.name: Nara Fen
fighters.notes: Mari Fen's cousin. Does not acknowledge the connection.

fighters.name: Priest of Ash
fighters.notes: Fights under divine contract terms. Wins count as Kharma donations.

fighters.name: Mads Cutter
fighters.notes: Veteran. Slow now. Still dangerous because he knows everything.

fighters.name: The Patchwork Kid
fighters.title: Most Injuries Per Bout
fighters.notes: Pol Greaves trained them. Fights like someone who expects to lose.

fighters.name: Lissa No-Name
fighters.notes: Nobody knows where she came from. Glass Sigil is interested.

fighters.name: Gorvin Slate
fighters.title: Crowd's Favourite Loser
fighters.notes: Loses dramatically. Enormous fan base. Suspects the fix is in.

match_log.location: the open-air Dust Ring at Guild Spires East
